title: Health Scoring Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger health scoring foundations judgment so customer success work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Health Scoring Foundations is a leverage point inside customer success. It supports the broader goal of retention, onboarding, support, and churn prevention.
coreConcepts: Health Scoring Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good health scoring foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Health Scoring Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
